scenario.description: 基于 electronic_warfare/spot_jamming 的点频压制干扰场景。Spot jamming suppression scenario where a jammer focuses energy on a specific frequency to degrade radar performance.

expected_events.success_condition: The jammer suppresses the radar's detection capability during the scenario.
